title: Structural Optimization
objective: Analyze the integration between ProjectCortex and SynthesisAgent and suggest 1 performance optimization.

tasks.intent: Gather historical data and documentation related to ProjectCortex and SynthesisAgent integration
Analyze the collected data to identify potential bottlenecks or inefficiencies in the integration
Design a proposed solution to optimize the identified bottlenecks or inefficiencies
Simulate the proposed solution to evaluate its effectiveness and potential impact on the system
Assess the security implications and potential risks of the proposed solution
Implement the optimized solution, considering any identified risks and taking necessary precautions
Perform thorough testing to ensure the implemented solution meets the performance optimization objective
Analyze the test results and assess the success of the optimization effort
Document the optimization effort, including the problem identified, the proposed solution, and the test results
